headline: Scotiabank Raises SBA Communications (SBAC) Price Target to $230
summary: SBA Communications Corp. (NASDAQ:SBAC) is one of the Best Digital Infrastructure REITs to Buy According to Analysts. On May 1, Scotiabank analyst Maher Yaghi increased the company’s target price on SBA Communications to $230 from $223 while keeping a sector perform rating on the shares, according to a report by TheFly. The analyst noted that […]

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on SBA Communications, Raises Price Target to $245
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   maintains SBA Communications (NASDAQ:SBAC) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $244 to $245.

headline: Truist Securities Reiterates Buy on SBA Communications, Raises Price Target to $248
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Niknam   reiterates SBA Communications (NASDAQ:SBAC) with a Buy and raises the price target from $247 to $248.
